---
title: "Mussel Biomarkers"
subtitle: "Questions & Notes"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Question Drop

This is where I keep my running list of questions about anything related to the work.

### Quick Links

1.  [Project repo](https://github.com/ChrisMantegna/wdfw_mussel_methylation)

2.  [Process Log](https://chrismantegna.github.io/labnotebook/project_log/mussel_methylation/process.html)

3.  Methods

### Questions - Process/ Code/ Data

### Log

#### 2026-04-14

-   Should I separate the treatments into 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 and 1.1, 1.2, 1.3 instead of the 0=Low and 1= High? Since there is a significant difference in the PAH concentrations.

| Sample IDs | PAH Concentration (ng/g) | Treatment (current ID) | Site Name |
|----------------------|---------------------------|------------|------------|
| 69M - 72M | 12078.42 | 1 | Elliot Bay, Myrtle Edwards |
| 92M - 95M | 7153.28 | 1 | Smith Cove, Terminal 91 |
| 78M - 81M | 3304.96 | 1 | Seattle Aquarium, Pier 59 |
| 269M - 272M | 127.26 | 0 | Broad Spit, Fisherman's Point |
| 105M - 109M (no 108) | 116.10 | 0 | Hood Canal Holly |
| 239M - 242M | 97.40 | 0 | Aiston Preserve |

: PAH Concentration Overview

### Questions - Conceptual

### Log

#### 2026-03-24

Setting up a place to put quick questions and notes so I don't derail myself trying to find the answer before I can continue.
